prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-FRZHAIRBP-BLU Product Type: HAIR_CLIP Brand (from catalog): Disney Frozen Existing Title: Frozen 2 Girls Hair Accessory Mini Backpack Gift Description: Is your child a Frozen Fanatic? Then this Disney Frozen 2 themed Girls Hair Accessory Backpack is the perfect gift.

This 7" tall mini backpack comes filled with fun Frozen-themed hair accessories featuring Snow Queen Elsa, Princess Anna and lovable snowman Olaf from the hit Disney franchise. Inside your child will be delighted to find 2 sparkle bow hair clips, 2 oval-shaped hair clips, and 6 soft sparkle hair ties. All of the accessories come in a cool wintery color scheme that will add a unique look to your child's hairdo.

The mini backpack itself is made of durable PVC and comes with adjustable straps for custom comfort. At just 7" x 6.25" x 2.25" in size, this is a great little backpack for young kids - they will love showing off their Frozen hair accessories at school, on playdates or at slumber parties. All items included are safe for children ages 3 and up. This is a must-have gift set for young girls and Frozen enthusiasts. Search Terms: elsa anna hair accessories olaf girls cosmetics gifts girls beauty gifts kids backpacks girls backpacks mini backpacks for girls hair accessories for girls hair bows hair clips pony tail holders hair ties for girls sparkly accessories kids Features: - OFFICIALLY LICENSED - Disney Frozen 2 Themed Hair Accessories Backpack Set - Comes with 10 Pieces - SPARKLE BOWS AND CLIPS - 2 Super Cute and Sparkly Hair Clips Shaped like Bows and 2 Oval Clips Featuring Elsa and Anna for Unique Look - SOFT HAIR TIES - Comes with 6 Soft Sparkly Hair Ties in Fun Winter and Frozen Colors | Show Off Love for Frozen 2 - PVC BACKPACK - Made of Durable Plastic that is Weather Resistant | Comes with Adjustable Straps for Custom Comfort - SMALL SIZE - 7" x 6.25" x 2.25" Backpack Perfect Size for Little Kids | All Accessories Safe for Children Ages 3 and Up === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Frozen Girls Hair Accessory Mini Backpack Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 10-Piece Set, Sparkly Bows And Clips, Hair Ties, Elsa And Anna, Ages 3, Durable PVC

openai.title_differentiation: 10 Piece Set, Elsa Anna Olaf Designs, Sparkle Hair Clips, Soft Hair Ties, Adjustable PVC Mini Backpack, Ages 3 Plus
